summary: Deadpan Stevie whose low-key steadiness keeps the archive from collapsing into pure chaos.
synopsis: A deadpan motel operator whose Stevie register is cooler and more observational than chaotic.
editorialBlurb: Stevie Budd carries a quieter form of name power. She is dry, grounded, and sharply responsive to the ridiculousness around her. The result is a Stevie who feels less like a brand and more like an atmospheric pressure system: low-key, stabilizing, and impossible to mistake for anyone else.
whyItMatters: She proves the index cannot collapse Steve-derived names into one gendered or tonal lane. Stevie has its own chemistry, and this is one of the clearest modern examples.
appearanceContext: Core ensemble Stevie whose observational calm becomes one of the show's most reliable tonal anchors.
sourceNotes: Core Stevie example with strong modern recognition.
